title: Final Fantasy XVI
insight: Final Fantasy 16 is the series’ first full-fledged action-RPG, fully doing away with the classic turn-based battle system it has long been known for and takes FF15’s action-combat to a whole-new level of complexity and depth. With Devil May Cry(DMC) combat director Ryota Suzuki on board, FF16 is the most modern evolution of stylish combo-driven combat that made the DMC series so popular.

title: Halo 3
insight: Halo 3, released in 2007, built upon the success of its predecessors and played a crucial role in popularizing online multiplayer gaming on consoles. With the introduction of Xbox Live, players could connect and compete globally, setting a standard for future multiplayer experiences. The game's success demonstrated the viability of online gaming, leading to a surge in multiplayer-focused titles across various genres, including shooters and action-adventure games.
